sec_11.prompt: What most likely caused the fraction comparison/simplifying errors?

response_options.label: The student does not yet reason about fraction size well enough.

response_options.label: Equivalent fractions are not secure enough yet.

sec_12.prompt: What most likely caused the fraction add/subtract errors?

response_options.label: The student does not yet understand what happens to the denominator.
response_options.misconception_hint: The student may not yet understand why the denominator stays the same or when equivalent fractions are needed.

response_options.label: Equivalent fractions needed before calculating were not secure.

response_options.label: The student is combining the numbers procedurally without understanding the parts.
